reason: Verify owner-only files, symlink safety, SQLCipher sidecars, cleanup, and no unrelated-file mutation.
Verify diagnostic DTOs and commands contain only fixed safe fields and failures.
Verify no runtime output, telemetry, credentials, mail content, identifiers, or local paths.
Verify OAuth, TLS, endpoints, remote-image/provider network policy, and safe errors remain intact.
Verify security, advisory, license, formatting, Clippy, and workspace test gates.
Verify diagnostics accessibility and hostile-mail sandbox/CSP behavior.
Verify generated bindings, strict runtime decoders, count invariants, and sensitive-field rejection.
Verify frontend tests, lint, typecheck, production build, and malicious corpus coverage.
Review capability, navigation, storage, IPC, decoder, and UI security flow end to end.
Cross-check the implemented V1 threat controls against the approved architecture research.
